description: Fetch an Azure DevOps work item (issue, bug, task, etc.). Set include_comments to also return discussion comments. When the workbench URL is bare https://dev.azure.com, pass organization; if the URL includes the org, organization may be omitted.

organization.description: Azure DevOps organization name (required when API root has no organization path segment).

include_comments.description: When true, also fetch work item comments (REST preview).
